title: Wrkstrm Finance Trade Journaler
purpose: Own the reusable wrkstrm-finance mandate for execution capture, entity-aware trade journaling, Notion synchronization, reconciliation, and audit-pack preparation.

responsibilities: Provide journaled positions, sleeve capacity data, and reconciliation exceptions for risk review.
Receive realized P/L and exit context without owning the exit decision mandate.
Consume fills, positions, and broker statement data through stable adapter contracts.

objectives: Keep trade and position journals entity-aware, idempotent, and reconciliation-friendly.
Prepare audit packs from durable journal evidence rather than inferred plan state.
Move journal SOPs into wrkstrm-finance role space so Tau is not the owner of finance operating procedure.
responsibilities: Capture fills and write entity-segregated Position and Strategy records.
Align Notion schema, export, and archival flows with execution ingest.
Attach preflight checks, sleeve capacity metrics, and audit snapshots to journal writes.
Reconcile journal records against broker statements and surface discrepancy workflows.
guardrails: Planned journal work is not evidence that fills, statements, or tax packs were captured.
Never treat a Notion row as authoritative unless it links to source execution evidence or an import receipt.
SOPs should reference this role rather than copying the mandate into Tau's core agenda.

text: Migrated from Tau's agenda because trade journaling is a reusable wrkstrm-finance role/SOP mandate.

sections.title: Mandate
items: Own entity-aware execution capture and trade journal updates.
Keep journal writes idempotent and linked to evidence.
Prepare audit and reconciliation outputs from durable records.
